snippets.description: additionalFields — role stays input:false; birthday/address/onboardedAt are input:true (self-write only)
snippets.content:
role: { type: 'string', required: false, input: false },
birthday: { type: 'string', required: false, input: true },
address: { type: 'string', required: false, input: true },
onboardedAt: { type: 'date', required: false, input: true },

snippets.description: Migration adds ONLY the two nullable columns
snippets.content:
ALTER TABLE "users" ADD COLUMN "address" varchar;
ALTER TABLE "users" ADD COLUMN "onboarded_at" timestamp;

snippets.description: completeProfile calls authClient.updateUser({name,birthday,address,onboardedAt:new Date()}) then awaits refetch(); hasCompletedProfile = user?.onboardedAt != null
Three mutually-exclusive gates; (tabs) requires isAuthenticated && hasCompletedProfile
